mapper.select: select id, news_title, news_content, news_publisher, create_time, news_type from t_news
mapper.insert: insert into t_news(news_title, news_content, news_publisher, create_time, news_type) values (#{newsTitle}, #{newsContent}, #{newsPublisher}, #{createTime}, #{newsType})
mapper.update:
update t_news
news_title = #{newsTitle},
news_content = #{newsContent},
news_publisher = #{newsPublisher},
news_type = #{newsType},
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_news where id in
#{item}
